guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 37. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_ee: Point to the big EE and say: eeeeee. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_oo: Now point to the big OO and say: oooooo.

parent_story: A tiny bee flew to the moon. The bee read a book in the sky.
